on.update: datum && item().mark.marktype !== 'group' && indexof(item().mark.role, 'legend') < 0 ? {unit: "view_3", fields: param_2_tuple_fields, values: [(item().isVoronoi ? datum.datum : datum)["year_dt"]]} : null
modify("param_2_store", param_2_toggle ? null : param_2_tuple, param_2_toggle ? null : true, param_2_toggle ? param_2_tuple : null)

description.signal: "year_dt: " + (timeFormat(datum["year_dt"], '%Y')) + "; Energy per Capita, (kWh/person): " + (format(datum["Energy_Value"], "")) + "; Energy Source: " + (isValid(datum["Energy_Source_Label"]) ? datum["Energy_Source_Label"] : ""+datum["Energy_Source_Label"]) + "; Energy_Source_Label: " + (isValid(datum["Energy_Source_Label"]) ? datum["Energy_Source_Label"] : ""+datum["Energy_Source_Label"])

on.update: datum && item().mark.marktype !== 'group' && indexof(item().mark.role, 'legend') < 0 ? {unit: "view_4", fields: param_2_tuple_fields, values: [(item().isVoronoi ? datum.datum : datum)["year_dt"]]} : null
modify("param_2_store", param_2_toggle ? null : param_2_tuple, param_2_toggle ? null : true, param_2_toggle ? param_2_tuple : null)

tooltip.signal: {"Year": format(datum["year_num"], ".0f"), "Total Energy (kWh/person)": format(datum["energy_per_capita"], ",.0f"), "Low-Carbon Energy (kWh/person)": format(datum["low_carbon_energy_per_capita"], ",.0f"), "Low-Carbon Share (%)": format(datum["LC_Energy_pct"], ".2f")}

description.signal: "year_dt: " + (timeFormat(datum["year_dt"], '%b %d, %Y')) + "; Year: " + (format(datum["year_num"], ".0f")) + "; Total Energy (kWh/person): " + (format(datum["energy_per_capita"], ",.0f")) + "; Low-Carbon Energy (kWh/person): " + (format(datum["low_carbon_energy_per_capita"], ",.0f")) + "; Low-Carbon Share (%): " + (format(datum["LC_Energy_pct"], ".2f"))

tooltip.signal: {"Year": format(datum.datum["year_num"], ".0f"), "Total Energy (kWh/person)": format(datum.datum["energy_per_capita"], ",.0f"), "Low-Carbon Energy (kWh/person)": format(datum.datum["low_carbon_energy_per_capita"], ",.0f"), "Low-Carbon Share (%)": format(datum.datum["LC_Energy_pct"], ".2f")}
